name: Azure Sentinel Detection Engineering Coverage
description: Coverage of the deployed detections (7 AzureActivity control-plane incl. a multi-stage correlation and an ARG-backed NSG content rule, 1 Defender for Endpoint, 1 Entra ID identity), with honest gaps in the same tactics. Green = covered by a deployed rule; red = known gap.

techniques.comment: DET-001 Failed Activity Log operations spike (heuristic, failed-permission probing)
DET-002 NSG rule change + DET-009 content-confirmed open inbound (ARG)
DET-003 (T1098.003) + DET-005 non-owner deployment + DET-007 grant-then-deploy correlation
DET-006 LSASS credential access (Defender for Endpoint)
DET-008 Successful sign-in after repeated failures (failure-then-success correlation on SigninLogs)
DET-008 Valid Accounts (a brute-forced/sprayed credential that succeeds)
GAP, Cloud Service Discovery: only partially implied by DET-001
GAP, Data from Cloud Storage: no storage data-plane access detection
GAP, Resource Hijacking: no crypto-mining / spend-anomaly detection

metadata.name: rules
metadata.value: 9 scheduled analytics rules (7 AzureActivity + 1 Defender for Endpoint + 1 Entra ID identity)
